summary:
Artisanal Restoration is the one-man company of master carpenter and cabinetmaker Randall Basti.

Randall has been woodworking since high school and has over three decades of professional experience in carpentry and adjacent trades. After a 5-year detour working as a project manager for American Express, where he gained valuable experience in management, administration, and business operations, he opened Artisanal Restoration and has spent 18 successful years serving historic homes in the Central New Jersey area.
servicesDescription: We specialize in the renovation and restoration of historic homes, restoration of antique furniture, and in custom-built furniture and cabinetry, but offer many other carpentry and home improvement services. For a full list of services, see [our Services page](/services).
servicesImageAlt: Detail image of a custom profile carved into a staircase handrail
areaServedDescription: We serve the Middle Tennessee and Nashville areas, focusing on homes in and around the following cities and townships:
portfolioText: You can visit [our Portfolio page](/portfolio) for a selection of projects representative of work you can expect from Artisanal Restoration.
